allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\gbr\\Downloads\\region"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { cd "c:\\Users\\gbr\\Downloads\\region"; node server.js 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Receive-Job $job; $job)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\gbr\\Downloads\\region" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/state" -UseBasicParsing; \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).aliases)
